title: Create HTML Structure and Content for Executive Presentation
description:
Create ./presentation/index.html with 12 slides:

1. Title slide with Delta Crown logo (use ../assets/logos/)
2. Executive Summary - key metrics
3. Business Context - why this matters
4. Current State diagram
5. Solution Overview - interactive architecture diagram
6. Technical Architecture
7. Phase Roadmap (Phases 1-8 from docs/)
8. Cost Analysis (/bin/sh strategy)
9. Risk Assessment matrix
10. Timeline visualization
11. Success Metrics
12. Next Steps + Q&A

Content sources: docs/00-architecture-overview.md, README.md, config/tenant-config.json

Worktree: feature/presentation-html

title: Create Interactive Features and Animations
description:
Create ./presentation/js/presentation.js with:

* Keyboard navigation (arrow keys, space, escape)
* Slide transitions with animations
* Interactive architecture diagram (click to expand nodes)
* Progress indicator
* Touch/swipe support for mobile
* Presentation controls (fullscreen, overview mode)

Worktree: feature/presentation-js

title: Create CSS Design System for Executive Presentation
description:
Create ./presentation/css/design-system.css with:

* CSS variables using Delta Crown brand colors:
  --color-primary: #006B5E (Deep Teal)
  --color-secondary: #D4A84B (Royal Gold)
  --color-background: #F5F3EF (Cream)
  --color-text: #1A2A3A (Dark Navy)
  --color-accent: #E8C989 (Light Gold)

* Typography: Playfair Display for headings, Tenor Sans for body
* Button styles (square, gold background)
* Card styles with subtle shadows
* Spacing scale (8px, 16px, 24px, 32px, 48px, 64px)
* Animation keyframes for slide transitions

Worktree: feature/presentation-css
